title: O Sing a New Song to the LORD

verses.text: God’s great salvation is revealed, for he has made it known, for he has made it known. He in the sight of nations all his righteousness has shown, his righteousness has shown, his righteousness has shown.
He had remembered Isr’el’s house in mercy and in truth, in mercy and in truth. God’s great salvation has been shown to all the ends of earth, to all the ends of earth, to all the ends of earth.
He surely comes to judge the earth; the judge of all is he the judge of all is he. He’ll judge the world with righteousness, all men with equity, all men with equity, all men with equity.
